## Description
## Related task / Issue
Resolves #

## Type of change
- [ ] Bugfix (fixes an issue)
- [ ] Feature (adds new functionality)
- [ ] Refactoring (code changes that do not alter behavior)
- [ ] Styling (visual changes, CSS, UI)
- [ ] CI/CD or configuration

## Developer quality checklist
- [ ] My code follows the project's standards (Prettier/ESLint ran without errors).
- [ ] I have added unit tests (Vitest) for the new logic.
- [ ] I have run the E2E tests locally (Playwright) and everything passed.
- [ ] I verified that the UI is responsive and renders correctly in Storybook.

## Screenshots (optional, but recommended for UI changes)
